name: goalforge
description: GoalForge - Goal Setting and Tracking Portal

scripts.preview:frontend: npm run build && npm --workspace frontend run preview -- --port 5173
scripts.stop:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter 'name = ''node.exe''' | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*GoalForge*' -and ($_.CommandLine -like '*vite*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*server.js*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*concurrently*') } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }"
